seo.title: Czterej Pancerni i Piec | Hackathon Team
seo.description: We are an award-winning hackathon team specializing in embedded systems, IoT, and robotics.

og.title: Czterej Pancerni i Piec
og.description: IoT projects, embedded systems, and winning prototypes. Meet the Czterej Pancerni i Piec team.

hero.paragraph: We specialize in embedded systems, Internet of Things (IoT) and hardware. Steel nerves, hot algorithms, and a soldering iron in hand.

loot.paragraph: They say code is priceless, but we like tangible rewards. From hackathons we bring home gear — see how our arsenal grows.

team.heading: Furnace Crew // Team
team.description: Four different specializations. One goal. When we join forces, no hardware is un-hackable.

item1.name: Igor
item1.description: The captain and the glue of the whole team. Project wrangler who helps equally in software, hardware and tough mechanics.

item2.name: Kamila
item2.description: The captain's right hand. Master of research—collects and analyses data, turning it into killer presentations and airtight arguments for the jury.

item3.name: Kuba
item3.description: Lead coder. Fullstack by nature—builds architectures and algorithms in Python and writes low-level firmware for microcontrollers.

item4.name: Bartek
item4.description: Brilliant constructor and mechanic. Designs and builds hardware from raw parts. After Nordic challenges at Hacknarök he also discovered a painter's soul.

achievements.heading: System Logs // Achievements
achievements.description: The history of our battles on the Polish hackathon scene.

item1.title: Mechaton AGH
item1.description: Project: Programming an industrial robot ASTOR for precision tasks.

item2.title: RCDC 2025
item2.description: Building a remote-controlled vehicle from raw components and winning the race on a dedicated track.

item3.title: Hacknarök 2026
item3.category: AIoT - Vikings' Smart City // eeStec AGH
item3.description: A city model using LED systems and servos to protect citizens from the 'whims' of Norse gods.

item4.title: 11th BEST Hacking League
item4.description: Distributed IoT chimney caps system for monitoring combustion products.

item5.title: RCDC 2026
item5.description: Another iteration building a remote-controlled vehicle from raw components for a dedicated racing track.

homepage.title: Czterej Pancerni i Piec
homepage.description: We build embedded systems, IoT software, and robots that win nationwide hackathons.
